name: openrct2-classroom-web
description: A Chromebook-first, local-save classroom launcher for the OpenRCT2 WebAssembly engine.

scripts.build: npm run verify:engine && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.verify:security: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm run verify:secrets && npm run verify:licenses && npm run verify:sbom
scripts.check: npm run verify:assets && npm test && npm run build && npm run verify:assets
scripts.check:ci: npm run check && npm run verify:security
